{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184500ABEB91EEDD43214B5FC4"}"},"total":80},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7606048380552495896","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常好看很喜欢五星好评"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770927091,"group_id":"7561050287637548094","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8P1nXRYoYcZtMiYiQjexMCdIbXciWl84OdKhOb5/KsB","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1411398032696040","user_name":"爱吃口蘑鲍汁的张天魁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1411398032696040","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7561050287637548094","book_info":{"abstract":"【男主视角+胎穿+科举种田+朝堂+无CP】

许氏全族，文盲泥腿子，百年都没出过读书人。

许老三酗酒家暴，韩氏残疾腿瘸，在村里常被人歧视嘲笑，也不受家里人待见，就这样的两个种田泥腿子，居然生出了个天才读书人？

许晋渊，上一世四省理科状元，名副其实的官二代富二代，却胎穿成农家小胖墩。

开始许晋渊只想摆烂等死，他再也不想刷题考试了，更不想起早贪黑的读书，做个无欲无求的农家咸鱼，也挺好的。

结果，造化弄人，面对大姐嫁人被婆家欺负，爹娘种田插秧，累的一辈子直不起腰，许家村被其他宗族肆意欺凌……

这一刻，许晋渊终于决定读书改变命运，他决定走科举之路。

只是他没想到，我一个理科状元考古代科举？这也太癫了吧？

虽然一开始的县试，府试，院试，都不太顺利

不过没关系，他天才学霸，顶级学神，就算没参加过科举，凭借他过目不忘和顶级智商，小小科举，轻松拿捏。

乡试过后，许晋渊突然一路开挂，重大喜报，接二连三的传到村里，这时，整个许家村都炸开了锅。

天哪！你们谁敢信？许家土院的那个小驴蛋，居然金榜题名，进士及第了呀？

好家伙，这许氏一族，怕是要为他族谱单开了吧？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5c04557fe83d6bcaa306e35b95cd4a69","author":"冰封君子","author_id":"","book_id":"7561050287637548094","book_name":"全族文盲科举，理科学霸强的可怕","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":832,"name":"科举","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=832&name=科举&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7593218845167321624","read_count":"37599","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"354205"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.9","serial_count":"145","tags":"历史古代,历史,穿越,天才,无女主,科举","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1fe12b933c2ae43120e530acb186f05c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779446700&x-signature=6ndln55pe5wiwMR18V3F1BpacuI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"633754785678408","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"36"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323184500ABEB91EEDD43214B5FC4"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen
